Research archive, projects, people, publications, and laboratory updates.

About

About

This page defines the current editorial frame of the RAMSLAB site while the final laboratory content is still being prepared.

placeholder institutional profile
Overview

Laboratory profile

RAMSLAB is being structured as a static-first research website built with Astro and content collections. The present version focuses on page hierarchy, archive behavior, and a restrained editorial visual language rather than on final public content.

Current scope

The archive currently includes projects, people, publications, news, and consortium partners. All entries remain placeholders intended to validate templates, metadata, and future editing workflows.

Contact

  • RAMSLAB
  • Research Activities on Measurements and Systems Lab
  • University of Pavia
  • ai.rams@unipv.it

Editing model

The site is driven by Markdown and data files so that future RAMSLAB updates can be made without redesigning templates. This keeps the architecture stable while content grows.

Department
Department of Industrial and Information Engineering
